scope: Contracts Management with Microsoft 365 and DocuSign integrations

opportunities.title: Secure redirection for HTTP callouts (release update)
opportunities.rationale: Relevant for external callouts used by contract integrations.
opportunities.prerequisite: Validate all outbound integration endpoints and redirect behavior.

opportunities.title: Flow auto-layout migration and compatibility check
opportunities.rationale: Contracts lifecycle orchestration commonly depends on Flow behavior stability.
opportunities.prerequisite: Inventory contract-related screen flows and migration state.

opportunities.title: Adopt Spring '26 Flow reliability/performance improvements
opportunities.rationale: Reduces runtime failures in approvals, renewals, and signing handoffs.
opportunities.prerequisite: Baseline existing flow runtime metrics and fault paths.

opportunities.title: LWC/Apex modernization for contract extensions
opportunities.rationale: Improves maintainability and reduces long-term technical risk.
opportunities.prerequisite: Map custom code touched by contract workflows.

opportunities.title: Contract lifecycle analytics expansion
opportunities.rationale: Improves visibility into negotiation, approval, and signature bottlenecks.
opportunities.prerequisite: Define KPI ownership and reporting sources.
